NKJV.1: A Song of Ascents. I will lift up my eyes to the hills— From whence comes my help?
NKJV.2: My help comes from the LORD, Who made heaven and earth.
NKJV.3: He will not allow your foot to be moved;  He who keeps you will not slumber.
NKJV.4: Behold, He who keeps Israel Shall neither slumber nor sleep.
NKJV.5: The LORD is your keeper; The LORD is your shade at your right hand.
NKJV.6: The sun shall not strike you by day, Nor the moon by night.
NKJV.7: The LORD shall preserve you from all evil; He shall preserve your soul.
NKJV.8: The LORD shall preserve your going out and your coming in From this time forth, and even forevermore.

ESV.1: I lift up my eyes to the hills. From where does my help come?
ESV.2: My help comes from the LORD, who made heaven and earth.
ESV.3: He will not let your foot be moved; he who keeps you will not slumber.
ESV.4: Behold, he who keeps Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.
ESV.5: The LORD is your keeper; the LORD is your shade on your right hand.
ESV.6: The sun shall not strike you by day, nor the moon by night.
ESV.7: The LORD will keep you from all evil; he will keep your life.
ESV.8: The LORD will keep your going out and your coming in from this time forth and forevermore.

NASB.1: A Song of Ascents. I will lift up my eyes to the mountains; From where shall my help come?
NASB.2: My help [comes] from the LORD, Who made heaven and earth.
NASB.3: He will not allow your foot to slip; He who keeps you will not slumber.
NASB.4: Behold, He who keeps Israel Will neither slumber nor sleep.
NASB.5: The LORD is your keeper; The LORD is your shade on your right hand.
NASB.6: The sun will not smite you by day, Nor the moon by night.
NASB.7: The LORD will protect you from all evil; He will keep your soul.
NASB.8: The LORD will guard your going out and your coming in From this time forth and forever.

NLT.1:
I look up to the mountains —
does my help come from there?
NLT.2:
My help comes from the LORD,
who made heaven and earth!
NLT.3:
He will not let you stumble;
the one who watches over you will not slumber.
NLT.4:
Indeed, he who watches over Israel
never slumbers or sleeps.
NLT.5:
The LORD himself watches over you!
The LORD stands beside you as your protective shade.
NLT.6:
The sun will not harm you by day,
nor the moon at night.
NLT.7:
The LORD keeps you from all harm
and watches over your life.
NLT.8:
The LORD keeps watch over you as you come and go,
both now and forever.

WEB.1: A Song of Ascents. I will lift up my eyes to the hills. Where does my help come from?
WEB.2: My help comes from Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.
WEB.3: He will not allow your foot to be moved. He who keeps you will not slumber.
WEB.4: Behold, he who keeps Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.
WEB.5: Yahweh is your keeper. Yahweh is your shade on your right hand.
WEB.6: The sun will not harm you by day, nor the moon by night.
WEB.7: Yahweh will keep you from all evil. He will keep your soul.
WEB.8: Yahweh will keep your going out and your coming in, from this time forward, and forever more.

AMP.1:
A Song of Ascents. I will lift up my eyes to the hills [of Jerusalem]—
From where shall my help come?
AMP.2:
My help comes from the LORD,
Who made heaven and earth.
AMP.3:
He will not allow your foot to slip;
He who keeps you will not slumber.
AMP.4:
Behold, He who keeps Israel
Will neither slumber [briefly] nor sleep [soundly].
AMP.5:
The LORD is your keeper;
The LORD is your shade on your right hand.
AMP.6:
The sun will not strike you by day,
Nor the moon by night.
AMP.7:
The LORD will protect you from all evil;
He will keep your life.
AMP.8:
The LORD will guard your going out and your coming in [everything that you do]
From this time forth and forever.

MSG.1:
A pilgrim song
I look up to the mountains;
does my strength come from mountains?
MSG.2:
No, my strength comes from God,
who made heaven, and earth, and mountains.
MSG.3:
He won't let you stumble,
your Guardian God won't fall asleep.
MSG.4:
Not on your life! Israel's
Guardian will never doze or sleep.
MSG.5:
God's your Guardian,
right at your side to protect you—
MSG.6:
Shielding you from sunstroke,
sheltering you from moonstroke.
MSG.7:
God guards you from every evil,
he guards your very life.
MSG.8:
He guards you when you leave and when you return,
he guards you now, he guards you always.

NIV.1:
Psalm 121
A song of ascents.
I lift up my eyes to the hills—
where does my help come from?
NIV.2:
My help comes from the Lord,
the Maker of heaven and earth.
NIV.3:
He will not let your foot slip—
he who watches over you will not slumber;
NIV.4:
indeed, he who watches over Israel
will neither slumber nor sleep.
NIV.5:
The Lord watches over you—
the Lord is your shade at your right hand;
NIV.6:
the sun will not harm you by day,
nor the moon by night.
NIV.7:
The Lord will keep you from all harm—
he will watch over your life;
NIV.8:
the Lord will watch over your coming and going
both now and forevermore.

NRSVCE.1:
I lift up my eyes to the hills —
from where will my help come?
NRSVCE.2:
My help comes from the LORD,
who made heaven and earth.
NRSVCE.3:
He will not let your foot be moved;
he who keeps you will not slumber.
NRSVCE.4:
He who keeps Israel
will neither slumber nor sleep.
NRSVCE.5:
The LORD is your keeper;
the LORD is your shade at your right hand.
NRSVCE.6:
The sun shall not strike you by day,
nor the moon by night.
NRSVCE.7:
The LORD will keep you from all evil;
he will keep your life.
NRSVCE.8:
The LORD will keep
your going out and your coming in
from this time on and forevermore.

NET.1: I look up toward the hills. From where does my help come?
NET.2: My help comes from the LORD, the Creator of heaven and earth!
NET.3: May he not allow your foot to slip! May your protector not sleep!
NET.4: Look! Israel’s protector does not sleep or slumber!
NET.5: The LORD is your protector; the LORD is the shade at your right hand.
NET.6: The sun will not harm you by day, or the moon by night.
NET.7: The LORD will protect you from all harm; he will protect your life.
NET.8: The LORD will protect you in all you do, now and forevermore.
